---
title: "Individual Tree Detection — LiDAR"
author: "Clarissa Gutierrez"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(lidR)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r segmented-tree-viewer}
# Load Plot 1
plot1 <- readLAS("C:/Users/clarigtz.stu/OneDrive - UBC/Documents/GEM521/LiDAR/Labs/Lab4/Plots/MKRF_Plot_1.las")

# Segment individual trees using Li et al. 2012
plot1_seg <- segment_trees(plot1, li2012(dt1 = 1.5, dt2 = 2, R = 2, Zu = 15))

# Render interactive 3D viewer and save as standalone HTML
plot(plot1_seg, color = "treeID")
rgl::rglwidget() %>% htmlwidgets::saveWidget("plot1_seg_3d.html", selfcontained = TRUE)
rgl::close3d()
```

```{html}
<iframe src="plot1_seg_3d.html" width="100%" height="600px" style="border:none;"></iframe>
```
